relations.note: Signature radius is a mandatory sub-spec of the gradient callout CTA layout.
Background/fallback treatment co-applies with the layout on the same section.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved gradient callout CTA composition and treatment.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA is a full-width banner with a headline and a single button overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. Headline sits in the top third: Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. Button sits in the lower-middle below the headline, centered: fill Deep Blue (#003D74), white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold (#FFC20E) arrow › (24px, size.cta.arrow_24) after two non-breaking spaces, sized 248 × 64px. Section padding 48px 25px 56px 25px, headline padding 0 0 32px 0.
rules.snippets:
<mj-section
    background-url="https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png"
    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

quotes: Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)
The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases**

rules.intent: Guarantee a solid brand fallback when the gradient image cannot render, without altering the rest of the treatment.
rules.rule_text: The section background is the gradient PNG applied as section background, sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine (#faa31b) as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images. The specified background asset must not be re-hosted or recolored. The background image may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget); when skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position, keep background-color="#faa31b", and every other rule (headline color, button color, button radius) stays identical.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the brand's signature asymmetric CTA button shape from alteration.
rules.rule_text: The button border-radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px is the signature asymmetric shape and is always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
